text:

Update cacti to 1.2.3

Update cacti to 1.2.3

Committer: please ignore gettext warnings, cacti has internal gettext support.
Poudriere testport logs for 11/i386 and 11/amd64 located at:

https://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/1.2.3/

12/i386 and 12/amd64 located at:

https://poudriere2.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/1.2.3/

No security updates in this release, just bugfixes and feature updates.
